name: Winter Salad
recipeInstructions:
The salad tastes fresh and summery despite being made with winter greens.
To toast pine nuts, place them on a baking sheet and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes. The dressing is low calorie and can be stored in the refrigerator for up to one week.
1. Tear spinach away from its ribs and break it into bite-sized pieces. Place these pieces into a large salad bowl.
2. Break radicchio into bite-sized pieces and add them to the spinach.
3. To prepare the dressing, whisk together all ingredients in a bowl. Taste and adjust seasoning by adding more lemon juice and dill as desired. Use about 3/4 cup (175 ml) of dressing for the salad and reserve the rest for dipping or dressing another salad.
